craigslist.title: Just what you wanted! A great 3 bed, 2 bath in College Park
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post The Enclave at Riverdale Leasing Office: 1507 Pine Dr College Park, GA 30349 Call for details: show contact info Take a look at what The Enclave at Riverdale has to offer! The living spaces at Enclave at Riverdale are thoughtfully designed with comfort and convenience in mind, and are stylishly appointed with the kind of premium materials and finishes you won't find in any other apartments for rent in College Park, GA. Rental Information: 3 Bedroom / 2 Bathroom / 1300 sq ft Monthly Price: $1602 *Optional and usage-based charges not included. Contact office to confirm pricing details and included fees. Lease Terms: 6-Month, 10-Month, 11-Month, 12-Month Apartment Amenities: ➢ Air Conditioning/Heating ➢ Cable Ready ➢ Carpet ➢ Ceiling Fans ➢ Dining Room ➢ Dishwasher ➢ Disposal ➢ Kitchen ➢ Range ➢ Tub/Shower ➢ Fireplace in Select Units ➢ Full unit upgrade ➢ High Speed Internet Access ➢ Microwave ➢ Plank Flooring ➢ Vinyl Flooring ➢ Walk-In Closets ➢ Washer/Dryer Hookup ➢ Window Coverings Additional Information: ➢ Cardio & Fitness Center ➢ Community Events ➢ On-site Maintenance ➢ On-Site Management ➢ Pet Care ➢ Resort Style Swimming Pool ➢ Basketball Court ➢ Business Center Coming Soon! ➢ Clothes Care Center ➢ Community Lake ➢ Electronic Rent Payment ➢ Package Receiving ➢ Tennis Court Leasing Hours: Mon - Fri: 8:30 AM - 5:30 PM Sat: 10:00 AM - 5:00 PM Sun: 1:00 PM - 5:00 PM Call for details: show contact info Pet Policy: A maximum of 2 pet per unit shall be accepted. The pet fee is $315 Non-Refundable per pet. $25 pet monthly rent. A pet addendum must be completed, and pet fees must be paid prior to moving in. If there is more than one pet per unit, the combined weight of the 2 pets cannot exceed 50 lbs. Please call our Leasing Office for complete Pet Policy information. Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/enclaveatriverdale Website: www.rentalsapts.com?n=enclave_at_riverdale&rp=kCrqJGNZ8qu8&t=wb Online Application: www.rentalsapts.com?n=enclave_at_riverdale&rp=kCrqJGNZ8qu8&t=ap Schedule a Tour: www.rentalsapts.com?n=enclave_at_riverdale&rp=kCrqJGNZ8qu8&t=sch All pricing, availability, fees, and terms are subject to change without notice. EQUAL HOUSING OPPORTUNITY 18F425B94AF5493
